full_text:
Wang Zhen (Shujing)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Wang Zhen, styledShujing, was born in Shangdang. Looked a healthy fifty but claimed to be over a hundred. Made many outstanding claims of his powers. Wang Zhen was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
